summary: rooms: convert per-device temperatures to °C using tempunit before averaging, and rename the output column to AVG_TEMP_C / avg_temperature_c.
reason: Each Dreo device carries its own tempunit (0=°C, 1=°F). Summing raw temperature across mixed-unit households produced meaningless averages (e.g. 22 + 72 → 47). The accumulator now reads tempunit per device, converts °F → °C, and the column header/JSON key now names the unit so consumers can't misread it.
